meta.title: Luan Cunha - Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Luan Cunha, full stack developer with solid experience in web products, AI engineering, automations, integrations and on-demand systems.
meta.ogDescription: Web products, AI engineering, automations, internal systems and mobile apps with full stack execution.
meta.personDescription: Full stack developer with solid experience in web products, AI engineering, automations, integrations and on-demand internal systems.

hero.lead: Full stack developer with years of shipping digital products, automations, AI engineering and systems that solve real business problems.

terminal.pairNote: LLMs speed up boilerplate, exploration and refactors; architecture, review and accountability stay human.
terminal.ready: ready to map your next project.

proof: building web products end to end
LLMs as a delivery tool, not a replacement for technical judgment
technology as a means, not theater
privateWork: Real projects under contract across product, operations and integration, with care to preserve sensitive context.
Experience in existing codebases, evolving live systems and shipping without breaking the business flow.
When code can't be public, the proof comes from clarity of scope, architecture and execution.

items.title: Web MVP
items.body: From idea to the first navigable product: frontend, backend, database, auth, integrations and deploy in short cycles.

items.title: AI engineering
items.body: Development workflows with LLMs, Codex, Claude Code, assisted review, automations and prototypes that speed delivery without giving up engineering.

items.title: Internal system
items.body: Dashboards, portals, lightweight CRMs and operational flows to move critical processes off fragile spreadsheets.

items.title: Automation with n8n
items.body: Workflows, webhooks, API integrations and routines to cut manual work and connect business tools.

items.title: Mobile app
items.body: React Native and Expo apps to validate mobile experiences, prototype flows and ship incremental releases.

items.title: Conversion landing page
items.body: A fast, responsive, focused page to validate an offer, capture leads and open sales conversations without noise.

stack.title: End-to-end architecture.
stack.lead: I can leave the pretty screen and reach the database, the API, the deploy queue, the LLM workflow and the maintenance after the system is live.

process.title: Less ceremony. More traceable delivery.
steps: Direct diagnosis of the problem and the expected outcome.
Architecture simple enough to maintain, strong enough to scale.
Delivery in short cycles, with clear checkpoints and production-ready code.

availability.title: Open to selected freelance work, technical consulting and on-demand projects.

contact.title: Got an idea stuck in the simulation?
contact.lead: Reach out with the project context. I'll help you turn the problem into scope, architecture and a concrete first delivery.

social.github: public code, experiments and personal projects

og.subtitle: Web products, AI engineering and on-demand automations.
